commit_message:

into a red one

Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-image-verify/1543/ : FAILURE

Unreleased image detected. Only released images are allowed in oom helm charts. ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-image-verify/1543/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-image-verify/1543

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/983/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/983/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-commit-lint/983

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm3.5/435/ : SUCCESS
